schema.description: Data representing a skin that has been converted and uploaded to Java Edition

hash.description: The hash of the skin bytes

is_steve.description: If the skin is a Steve or an Alex

signature.description: The signature of the skin data used by Minecraft

texture_id.description: The texture id used by Minecraft

value.description: The value of the skin data used by Minecraft

schema.title: ConvertedSkin

200.description: Converted skin or an empty object if there is no skin stored for that player

schema.description: Generic format for pretty much every error
schema.title: Error
